title: Self-play data generation
description: Play full games where the net plays itself via MCTS. Record (canonical_state, mcts_pi, outcome_z) per move, z assigned from final result relative to mover. Output a list of training examples.

title: Two-headed neural network (PyTorch)
description: Shared trunk + policy head (move logits over action space) and value head (scalar tanh in [-1,1]). Game-agnostic input/output shapes derived from the Game interface. Forward returns (policy_logits, value).

title: MCTS with PUCT
description: Network-guided Monte Carlo Tree Search. Node stats N/W/Q/P; PUCT selection; expansion via single net eval; value backup; Dirichlet noise at root; temperature-based action selection. Returns visit-count policy pi.

title: Evaluation + verify tic-tac-toe solved
description: Arena pitting candidate net vs previous/random/perfect player. Track win/draw/loss over iterations. Verify trained agent never loses tic-tac-toe and draws vs perfect play.

title: Game interface + tic-tac-toe rules
description: Abstract game interface (swappable rules module) + tic-tac-toe: board state, legal moves, apply move, terminal/winner detection, canonical board encoding for the net (planes), and a perspective-aware result. Game-agnostic so MCTS/training are reusable.

title: Training loop (policy + value loss)
description: Replay buffer of self-play examples. Loss = cross-entropy(net_policy, mcts_pi) + MSE(net_value, z) + L2. SGD/Adam optimizer; one iteration = generate self-play, train, checkpoint.
